name: The Concrete Lobbyist
effectDesc: +20 Base GDP to all Industry cards.

name: The PR Firm
effectDesc: +1 Approval every time you spend Treasury cash.

name: Special Economic Zone
effectDesc: Slot 3 costs 0 Action Points, but deals double Biosphere damage.

name: The Chicago School
effectDesc: All Industry cards get x2 GDP, but their positive Approval is deleted.

name: Deregulation
effectDesc: You gain +2 Action Points per term, but you can no longer Discard.
